nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (Angelica Keiskei/Chrysanthemum Zawadskii) Leaf/Stem/Cinnamomum Cassia Bark/Trichosantes Kirilowii Fruit/Ulmus Davidiana Bark/Root/(Paeonia Japonica/Bupleurum Falcatum/Polygala Tenuifolia Root)/Viscus Album Stem Extract
chemicalDescription: (Angelica Keiskei/Chrysanthemum Zawadskii) Leaf/Stem/Cinnamomum Cassia Bark/Trichosantes Kirilowii Fruit/Ulmus Davidiana Bark/Root/(Paeonia Japonica/Bupleurum Falcatum/Polygala Tenuifolia Root)/Viscus Album Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of Angelica keiskei and Chrysanthemum zawadskii ; the bark of Cinnamomum cassia ; the fruit of Trichosantes kirilowii ; the bark and roots of Ulmus davidiana ; the roots of Paeonia japonica, Bupleurum falcatum and Polygala tenuifolia ; and the stems of Viscus album.
inciName: (ANGELICA KEISKEI/CHRYSANTHEMUM ZAWADSKII) LEAF/STEM/CINNAMOMUM CASSIA BARK/TRICHOSANTES KIRILOWII FRUIT/ULMUS DAVIDIANA BARK/ROOT/(PAEONIA JAPONICA/BUPLEURUM FALCATUM/POLYGALA TENUIFOLIA ROOT)/VISCUS ALBUM STEM EXTRACT
